framework.name: canada_aida
framework.description: Artificial Intelligence and Data Act (Bill C-27) — Canada's federal AI regulation focused on high-impact systems.

controls.name: aida-1
controls.description: Designate whether the system meets the high-impact threshold under AIDA.

controls.name: aida-2
controls.description: Implement measures to mitigate risks of harm or biased output.

controls.name: aida-3
controls.description: Keep records describing the system, its risks, and mitigations.
